Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the existing backorder report with live inventory data, flags dead-end parts that have no viable sourcing path, and categorizes each line item by resolution status.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Gives the team an instant, prioritized view of which orders can be fulfilled soon and which need escalation — turning a raw report into an actionable dashboard.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for each backorder scenario, including updated ETAs, substitution options, and dead-end notifications.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Customers receive proactive, accurate order updates without reps having to manually compose individual emails, dramatically improving response time and customer satisfaction.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to compile a comprehensive make/model/year reference sheet for all available two-piece rotors.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Aggregates competitor and supplier product data automatically, eliminating the tedious manual process of visiting multiple websites and copying specifications by hand.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped two-piece rotor data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify overlaps, gaps, and potential new product opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Reveals exactly where DFC already competes and where market opportunities exist, enabling data-driven product expansion decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers to gather demand data and purchase interest for two-piece rotor applications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Captures real demand signals from the customer base before committing to inventory, reducing the risk of stocking parts with no market and validating opportunities with actual buyer feedback.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Consolidates all scraped catalog data, DFC cross-references, and customer demand responses into one formatted output sheet for Dino's review.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Dino receives a single, comprehensive document combining market intelligence and demand data — ready for immediate product planning decisions without additional assembly.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad copy across Meta and TikTok campaigns, searching for specific flagged phrases within every text field of each ad.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides instant compliance and brand safety coverage across all live ads, catching problematic language that would otherwise require manual review of hundreds of ad variations.

Meta Investigation.action: Analyzes the extracted ad copy to identify exact matches and contextual matches for the target phrases, recording the specific field and full copy where each match occurs.
Meta Investigation.impact: Accurately pinpoints not just which ads contain flagged language but exactly where in each ad the issue lives, enabling precise and fast remediation without reviewing entire campaigns.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted flagged-list email detailing every ad with matched phrases, including the campaign name, specific field, and exact copy snippet for each finding.
Meta Investigation.impact: The team receives a clear, actionable report they can immediately act on to update or pause non-compliant ads, reducing legal and brand risk exposure time from days to minutes.

summary: We're tracking 53 total agents in the pipeline — 24 completed, 8 in progress, and 21 planned. This week we added four new agents: the Cerritos Building Sublet Agent, which runs daily lead-gen for the Midway Place sublet space; the R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI agent, now in early development; R1 Video Clipper; and a Paid Channel Chatbot. On the progress front, Agent Tracker Agent V2 moved to Completed, giving us an upgraded version of our weekly pipeline digest. Momentum is strong heading into next week with a healthy mix of new additions and agents crossing the finish line!
